title: Ceremonial Mushroom Cutting
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Mushroom_Cutting_ceremony.jpg|thumb|right|250px|Mushroom Cutting ceremony with [[Marja Lang]], [[Herron Dade]], [[Kaiya Adrimetrum]], and [[Gorak Khzam]]]]
The '''Ceremonial Mushroom Cutting''' was an annual event on [[Gandle Ott]]. A holdover from the first days of the colony's existence, it symbolized the first imported crops grown for self-sufficiency. The ceremony consisted of cutting the stalks of several [[cattarash mushroom]]s, then brewing them into a tea. Then, all present at the ceremony would drink the beverage.

==History==
In [[8 ABY/Legends|8 ABY]], the ceremony was performed shortly after the arrival of [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] representatives from the [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] ''[[FarStar]]''. Several officers from the corvette attended the ceremony, along with Acting-Governor [[Marja Lang]] and [[General/Legends|General]] [[Herron Dade]]. In this case, the ceremony was reinterpreted as a declaration of independence from the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]].

==Appearances==
*{{DarkStryder|adventure=Death Is Remotely Possible|book=The DarkStryder Campaign|reprint=yes}}
